MetalHull.title: Hull wall
MetalHull.description: An impermeable hull that can hold atmosphere. Required to enable the placement of flooring.

MetalHullCorner.title: Hull wall armour
MetalHullCorner.description: Armoured hull is used on ship exteriors. Due to its heavy nature is made porous to save weight. This means it does not hold atmosphere.

MetalHullAngle.title: Hull wall armour
MetalHullAngle.description: Armoured hull is used on ship exteriors. Due to its heavy nature is made porous to save weight. This means it does not hold atmosphere.

MetalFloor.title: Hull floor
MetalFloor.description: A standard type of flooring used in spaceships across the galaxy. Place on top of hull to create rooms.

ConcreteFloor.title: Concrete floor
ConcreteFloor.description: A heavy flooring used in large crafts. Place on top of hull to create rooms.

CarpetFloor.title: Carpet
CarpetFloor.description: A very comfortable luxury carpet. Must be placed on top of other flooring.

WoodFloor.title: Wooden flooring
WoodFloor.description: A standard type of flooring made from wood. Must be placed on top of other flooring.

ArmouredBlastDoor.title: Armoured blast door
ArmouredBlastDoor.description: A manual, reinforced air tight door.
